_comment: Full-trust desktop slave: the host grants all rights to the controller. screen/shell/him/kvm run for real (URISYS_ALLOW_REAL=1) and execute WITHOUT per-call approval because require_approval_for is empty. Enforced by urisysnode.serve.apply_host_trust. Narrow trust by listing operation globs (e.g. "him.*", "browser.form.submit") that should still demand explicit approval. Pair with URISYS_NODE_REQUIRE_SIGNATURE=1 + trusted keys when exposed beyond localhost/LAN.
